Martin Nyaga

Hi, I’m Martin

Lead Software Engineer · Leeds, UK

I’m a hands-on technical lead with 12 years of experience building complex software systems. The hard parts are usually below the surface: legacy code, performance constraints, industrial data, AI workflows, and the architecture needed to make everything hold together.

I work somewhere between the code, the system design, and the team: turning ambiguity into technical direction, and technical direction into software that ships.

Now

  • Lead Software Developer at DRS Software.
  • Co-founder of Performa, building mobile, backend, and AI systems for personalised fitness.

Selected work

  • Led the modernisation of a large-scale legacy C++ application into a WebAssembly + TypeScript web platform, from scoping to worldwide production rollout in under 12 months.
  • Led development on industrial analytics and AI systems for process engineering, including work supported by an Innovate UK SMART Grant.
  • 2× Leader of the Year finalist at Leeds Digital Festival, and named Leeds & West Yorkshire Top 30 Under 30 in 2025.

Open Source Projects

Logisim.app

Classic Logisim — the widely used digital logic simulation software — running in the browser powered by WebAssembly.

Java · WebAssembly Contributor
Fast Statistics

A high performance native ruby extension (written in C++) for computation of descriptive statistics.

Ruby · C++ Owner
Termplot

A terminal plotting tool for visualising streaming data.

Ruby Owner
Redlock-rb

Ruby implementation of Redlock, the redis-based distributed locking algorithm

Ruby · Redis Contributor
